description: Trigger evals for the resend skill — prompts that SHOULD load it and prompts that should NOT.
should_trigger: send a test email from contact@myproject.com
add email sending to my Cloudflare Worker with Resend
add and verify a domain in Resend
set up contact@ on my domain so it forwards to my Gmail
wire up Gmail send mail as for my custom domain
I want transactional email for my SaaS
here is my resend api key re_abc123 what can you do
configure DKIM and SPF for sending email from my domain
should_not_trigger: send a Slack message to the team
set up Cloudflare DNS for my domain
deploy my Next.js app to Vercel
read the latest emails in my Gmail inbox
write a marketing email newsletter copy
